text:
There's this old bookstore that nobody wants anymore. Just shelves with stuff fallen out. I heard there were beetles crawling around inside.

One day, I sneak into there. I find this cage labelled "Ornaments'? I take it. There's this gorgeous big bird. I think I just fell mad.

I keep. I take you home. I sew you into my coat collar every night.

We go places. I drop. People think. Oh. Why would you do that?

You just sit there. You look alive.

I go away. I buy seeds. You lay eggs. I plant.

I die.

You grow.

Everyone thinks I'm you.

You stay here on my shelf.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
